meta.meta_description: Free property calculators to help you plan, budget and make confident property decisions in the UK.

hero.title: All Calculators
hero.description: Smart tools and calculators to help you plan, budget and make confident property decisions.

help.title: Need Help Using a Calculator?
help.text: Our guides explain how each calculator works and what the results mean.

popular_calcs.title: Stamp Duty Calculator
popular_calcs.desc: Calculate how much Stamp Duty Land Tax you'll pay.

popular_calcs.title: Mortgage Affordability Calculator
popular_calcs.desc: See how much you can borrow and what you can afford.

popular_calcs.title: Buying Cost Calculator
popular_calcs.desc: Estimates all the costs involved in buying a property.

all_calcs.title: Stamp Duty Calculator
all_calcs.desc: Calculate how much Stamp Duty Land Tax you'll pay.

all_calcs.title: Mortgage Affordability Calculator
all_calcs.desc: Check how much you can borrow and what you can afford.

all_calcs.title: Buying Cost Calculator
all_calcs.desc: Estimate legal fees, surveys, taxes and other buying costs.

all_calcs.title: Mortgage Overpayment Calculator
all_calcs.desc: See how overpayments can reduce your loan and save interest.

all_calcs.title: Land Transaction Tax Calculator
all_calcs.desc: Calculate Land Transaction Tax (Scotland) on property purchases.

all_calcs.title: Rent vs Buy Calculator
all_calcs.desc: Compare the cost of renting vs buying a home.

all_calcs.title: How Much Deposit Do I Need?
all_calcs.desc: See how much deposit you need based on property price and mortgage.

all_calcs.title: Selling Cost Calculator
all_calcs.desc: Estimate estate agent fees and other costs of selling.

all_calcs.title: Capital Gains Tax Calculator
all_calcs.desc: Calculate CGT if you're selling a second property or buy-to-let.

all_calcs.title: Moving Cost Calculator
all_calcs.desc: Estimate removal company and moving home costs.

all_calcs.title: Survey Cost Estimator
all_calcs.desc: Get an estimate for different types of property surveys.

all_calcs.title: Equity Release Calculator
all_calcs.desc: See how much equity you could release from your home.

all_calcs.title: Offer Strategy Calculator
all_calcs.desc: Work out the best offer price based on market data.

all_calcs.title: Energy Cost Estimator
all_calcs.desc: Estimate energy bills for a new property based on size and EPC.

find_cta.title: Not sure which calculator you need?
find_cta.description: Answer a few simple questions and we'll recommend the right calculator for you.
